revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-125

A cable in which the cores are surrounded by conducting coverings to prevent electromagnetic interaction of the fields due to the conductors with each other or with external fields.
